title: Packet 017 Artifact Publication And Host Mirror Resync Gate
objective: Publish the Packet 017 host-created handoff and the minimal related post-017 authority-state surfaces through `C:/APEX Platform`, excluding unrelated `.vercelignore`, then fast-forward-only synchronize `/home/olares/code/apex` to the resulting governing commit so publication hygiene is restored before any later readiness reassessment is considered.
dependency_note: Packet 018 concluded that publication-first is the smallest truthful next move after Packet 017, because the remaining issue is publication hygiene for the single host-created Packet 017 artifact rather than host-edit repeatability. This packet exists to publish that artifact and restore host-mirror parity without widening scope.
required_inputs: The Packet 018 ruling that the Packet 017 host-created handoff should be published before any later readiness reassessment packet opens
The Packet 017 execution handoff and the minimal related Packet 017 or Packet 018 authority-state surfaces selected for publication
The current workstation parent-root state at `C:/APEX Platform`, including unrelated `.vercelignore` that must be excluded
The current prepared host mirror state at `/home/olares/code/apex` on `clean-main` at `8be69f166a0ac738304d178e9443166852e4ee7f`, with the Packet 017 handoff as the only host-side untracked artifact
constrained_outputs: A dated execution handoff recording the bounded publication scope, resulting governing commit, and post-sync host-mirror evidence for the Packet 017 artifact publication lane
A recorded statement of whether the host mirror is clean again and current enough for a later readiness reassessment to be considered
No migration approval, no host runtime mutation, no old-clone mutation, and no widening into AI-services, Gitea/code-hosting, or canonical-hosting work
validation_steps: Review parent-root git status at `C:/APEX Platform` and confirm the proposed publication scope is limited to the Packet 017 handoff plus the minimal related Packet 017 or Packet 018 authority-state surfaces only.
Exclude unrelated `.vercelignore`, secrets, runtime artifacts, host-only state, service configuration changes, implementation work outside this authority-publication lane, and any old-clone content.
Create and publish the bounded parent-root commit to the GitHub-canonical repository, recording branch, remote, included paths, and resulting commit hash.

Capture pre-sync `/home/olares/code/apex` branch, remote, commit, cleanliness, and byte-identity evidence for the untracked Packet 017 artifact without mutating `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform`.
Synchronize `/home/olares/code/apex` to the published commit using a non-destructive fast-forward-only method that handles the byte-identical untracked artifact without force, reset, or clean.
Capture post-sync evidence that the host mirror is clean again and now contains the Packet 017 execution handoff plus the included post-017 authority-state artifacts.

Stop if execution would require migration approval, host runtime mutation, old-clone mutation, service changes, auth or ingress changes, AI-services rollout, Gitea work, canonical-hosting change, force, reset, clean, remote rewrite, or inclusion of unrelated parent-root changes in the publication commit.
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes bounded parent-root publication and fast-forward-only host mirror synchronization only. It does not authorize database writes, host-runtime mutation, old-clone mutation, AI-services rollout, Gitea work, canonical-hosting changes, or migration approval.
closure_note: Not yet executed. This packet exists because Packet 018 concluded that publication-first is the next truthful move: the Packet 017 host-created handoff should be published and `/home/olares/code/apex` should be resynchronized before any later readiness reassessment is considered.
next_action: Execute this packet only as a bounded parent-root publication and fast-forward-only host mirror resync lane. Exclude `.vercelignore`, preserve `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform`, handle the byte-identical untracked Packet 017 artifact non-destructively, and do not treat Packet 019 as migration approval or as authorization for runtime mutation, AI-services work, Gitea/code-hosting work, canonical-hosting changes, remote rewrite, force, reset, or clean.
